prompt: Improve the node-app quickstart by editing README.md only. Make it clear that the reader can run npm test, mention the calculator helpers that actually exist in src/calculator.js, and avoid any source-code changes.
success_criteria: README.md is clearer and uses only fixture-accurate commands and files
The docs mention npm test and the calculator helpers in src/calculator.js
No runtime source files are modified
The final report accurately states that verification was not required
